summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HimPrash EV Accessories Platform. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Get all products API (12 products returned)
Get categories API (6 categories: Cables, Charging, Exterior, Interior, Mounts, Tech)
Filter products by category (Charging filter returns 2 products)
Filter products by price range ($100-$300 returns 5 products)
Get featured products (6 featured products returned)
Get single product by ID (prod-001 with all required fields)
404 error handling for non-existent products
Homepage loads with hero section, navbar, featured products, footer
Navbar navigation between Home and Products pages
Hero CTA 'Explore Products' button navigates to /products
Featured products section displays 6 product cards from API
Product listing page shows 12 products in grid layout
Category filter checkboxes work (Charging filter shows 2 products)
Price range slider filters products correctly (7 products after adjustment)
Combined category and price filters work (Interior + price = 1 product)
Clear all filters button resets to 12 products
Product card click navigates to product detail page
Product detail page shows image, name, price, stock status, description, compatibility
Add to Cart button shows toast notification
Breadcrumb navigation works on product detail page
Back to all products link works
Mobile responsive layout with navbar toggle functionality
